title: Replication Package for "Evaluating and Mitigating the Misguidance Effect of Buggy Code in LLM-Generated Unit Tests"
description: Replication package for the paper Evaluating and Mitigating the Misguidance Effect of Buggy Code in LLM-Generated Unit Tests (Proceedings of the ACM on Software Engineering 3, ISSTA, 2026). It contains the data preprocessing scripts, prompt-construction and test-generation pipeline, evaluation harness for Defects4J, sequence-score analysis, prompt examples, and the manual inspection results.
